ModMetaData.name: LxO - Auto Draft
ModMetaData.author: Lexxers
ModMetaData.description:
Automatically drafts your soldiers when threats appear and undrafts them when the danger is over.
Configure which pawns are soldiers via the settings. When a raid, manhunter pack, or other hostile event hits, soldiers are instantly drafted and sent to rally points. Non-combatants flee to safety.
After all threats are eliminated, soldiers auto-undraft and return to work.
Works perfectly with LxO - Smart Gear (equips combat gear) and LxO - Learn to Survive (combat instinct).
